news: [Iceberg levels] You are at level 0. At best. Can you progress to deeper levels ?
[Level 0] SQL injection strategies: Time, Blind bin, Blind bit, Multibit, Error, Union (https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Strategy)
[Level 1] Remote Code Execution via User Defined Function or Web shell (https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection/wiki/Exploit)
[Level ?] Deep... lost... Buffer overflow ? alone... so cold...
[Contribute?] Create your pull request : many mysql and postgres clones to cover, testing on docker using python and .NET endpoints, or any other topic
[Pinned] Report any bugs and thoughts, add your star at https://github.com/ron190/jsql-injection
[Subtle music starts flowing and rolling to your ears, light and soft classical arrangements. Also free ad. No, you can't put car ads here]
